title: Turnaround Sheet Studies
description: Four independent character-sheet studies exploring different production pipelines while preserving professional turnaround clarity.
creative_direction: Each image is a self-contained four-view character turnaround sheet for a different world and role. The package stresses technical-diagram discipline, identity continuity inside each sheet, and believable game-animation production presentation without reference dependencies.

en.title: Turnaround Sheet Studies
en.description: Four independent character-sheet studies exploring different production pipelines while preserving professional turnaround clarity.

zh-CN.title: 四视图设定单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立角色四视图设定图，分别测试不同世界观下的工业化角色设计表达。
